- [2026-07-01T04:41:03Z] Taylor/finding — buy-limit-price-chase-ceiling: {"job": "Taylor_20260701_043909", "question": "Vì sao rổ lệnh MUA đặt thấp hơn khá xa so với best bid?", "verdict": "BY DESIGN — không phải bug", "mechanism": "executor._limit_price (trading_bot/executor.py:243-270): px_mua = min(desired, cap), cap = ref_price*(1+max_chase_pct_buy). SpaceX live: max_chase_pct_buy=0.015 (1.5%), ref_price=close ngày signal (2026-06-30). Khi giá thị trường đã chạy >1.5% trên close hôm trước → px bị kẹp tại ref*1.015, NẰM DƯỚI bid/ask hiện tại (docstring L14-15, journal note L489 nằm chờ tại trần đuổi). Cơ chế 2: cross_mode=adaptive @1B hầu hết lệnh <1% ADV → nhánh DIP mean-reversion (_decide_cross_adaptive L209-241): nếu r15 cho thấy giá đã tăng thì cross=False → đặt bid+1tick chờ nhịp dip, KHÔNG đuổi.", "implication": "2026-07-01 go-live NEUTRAL, 23 BUY urgency=normal. Nếu phiên sáng gap-up, phần lớn lệnh mua bị cap 1.5% trên close 30/06 → treo dưới thị trường. Đây là kỷ luật anti-overpay/patience: đổi fill-rate lấy giá vào tốt hơn. Cost: ngày trending-up có thể KHÔNG khớp (atc_remainder_buy=false → phần dư bị bỏ, mai plan sync lại), KHÔNG đuổi vào ATC.", "not_a_bug": true, "citations": ["executor.py:243-270 _limit_price", "executor.py:249 cap", "executor.py:252-254 desired", "config.py:47 max_chase_pct_buy=0.015", "executor.py:209-241 adaptive DIP"]}
- [2026-07-01T04:41:09Z] Taylor/heartbeat — Taylor_20260701_043909: {"status": "still_running", "elapsed_min": 2, "job_id": "Taylor_20260701_043909"}

NORMAL's next-session-close carry is a disclosed counterfactual fill model applied to the baseline, not a live signal leak.", "oos_robustness": "na — execution-microstructure replay, not an IS/OOS strategy edge. Cannot split; sign is regime-dependent (cascade + / V-dip −). Finding states this honestly.", "panel_curation_bias": "pass — 18 hardcoded names are the real Tier-1 liquid book, appropriate for a fill study; no CAGR/return claim, no >30% mirage. Not survivorship in the return sense.", "reproducibility_selfcheck": "fail — (a) the 'self-check 0 VND' is a tautology (Σ of one column two ways), not a NAV identity; (b) the 126-buy leg has NO source script or CSV columns (extreme_replay.py has zero buy logic); (c) the `ret` column is NaN in all 144 rows because vnstock pads days to 96 bars with a NaN 23:45 close, so the 'down-day' filter never fired — '144 down-day sells' is really all 18x8 combos. Sell-side gap-lock numbers DO recompute exactly, but the finding as a whole is not fully auditable.", "param_overfit": "pass — extreme_band=3% and floor_band=7% (a real HOSE constant) are design params, not fit to this data; recommendation explicitly says do-NOT-tune. No sensitivity sweep provided, but no magic number is being certified either.", "capacity_adv_realism": "pass — 18 Tier-1 liquid names, the opposite of the micro-name trap. Caveat (disclosed): EXTREME assumes full fill at floor VWAP, optimistic on a locked floor with a large sell queue.", "arithmetic_mechanism": "pass — all sell-side headline numbers reconcile to quoted precision (−5.55/−6.55, −13.4/−6.9, 3.8/0.3pp, +2.63/−3.08pp). Mechanism correctly cast as tail-insurance (~1pp mean cost for tail compression), analogous to DT5G, NOT a return-enhancer. Only defect: the '144 down-sells' denominator is mislabeled by the dead filter."}, "independent_recompute": "Reloaded data/extreme_replay.csv and recomputed the full sell-side: 22 gap-lock cases, NORMAL -5.55% -> EXTREME -6.55% (-1.0pp), worst -13.45%->-6.89%, std 3.82->0.31pp, 9/22 beat, Apr-2025 n=8 +2.63pp, Mar-2026 n=14 -3.08pp — every number matched to quoted precision. Also traced the NaN-ret to the 96-bar/23:45-NaN padding in the VCI parquet.", "killer_objection": "The entire result rests on 3 crash days (2 episodes) with a sign that flips between them, half the finding (buy leg) is unreproducible from any cited artifact, and the advertised self-check is a tautology — so the headline sell numbers reproduce but the finding cannot be certified as auditable.", "recommended_reruns": ["Fix the down-day filter: drop NaN bars before `cl = d['close'].iloc[-1]` (or use last non-NaN close) so '144 down-sells' actually means down->3% close days; report the corrected denominator/strand-rate.", "Publish the buy-leg script + a buy CSV so the 126-buy numbers (mean entry, p05/p95) are recomputable, or drop the buy claim to 'not yet validated'.", "Replace the tautological self-check with a real reconciliation (e.g. per-name Sigma exit deltas tied to a notional NAV path).", "State explicitly that the sell conclusion is 3-day / 2-episode thin and re-run if/when 2022 intraday or more cascades become available."], "summary": "The load-bearing sell-side claim reproduces EXACTLY from the cited CSV — sell-to-floor trades ~1pp of mean exit (-5.55->-6.55%) for hard tail compression (worst -13.4->-6.9%, dispersion 3.8->0.3pp, same-day fill 0->100%), positive in the Apr-2025 cascade (+2.63pp) and negative in the Mar-2026 V-dip (-3.08pp). The mechanism is correctly framed as deliberately-activated tail-insurance, not alpha, and the default-OFF / don't-tune recommendation is safe. But three real defects block a clean CONFIRMED: the 'self-check 0 VND' is a tautology (no genuine identity check), the entire buy-pause leg is unreproducible from any cited artifact, and a dead `ret` filter (vnstock's NaN 23:45 padding) means '144 down-day sells' is actually all 18x8 combos — a false label, though harmless to the 22 gap-lock cases. Combined with a 3-day/2-episode sample, the finding's core is sound and safe to code default-OFF, but it is not fully auditable as presented, so: INCONCLUSIVE — proceed to Step 2 after closing the audit gaps, do not stamp as verified."}
